ohtani.title: Pages, Muncy hit back-to-back homers in Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Andy Pages, Max Muncy and Teoscar Hernández crush homers in the Dodgers' 6-0 win over the Angels\n

imanaga.title: Mike Yastrzemski hits go-ahead double in Braves' win
imanaga.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski comes up clutch with a go-ahead double in the 8th inning to back a lockdown bullpen performance in the Braves' 4-1 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Cubs offense comes alive against White Sox in win
suzuki.blurb: Cubs offense scores 10 runs, led by Carson Kelly's four RBI game in their 10-5 win over their cross-town rival White Sox

yoshida.title: Mike Yastrzemski's walk-off lifts Braves
yoshida.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski hits a walk-off double and Drake Baldwin goes deep in the Braves' 3-2 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Torkelson's walk-off single propels Tigers to 3-2 win
okamoto.blurb: A walk-off single from Spencer Torkelson and a game-tying double in the 6th from Riley Greene give the Tigers a 3-2 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Cubs offense comes alive against White Sox in win
murakami.blurb: Cubs offense scores 10 runs, led by Carson Kelly's four RBI game in their 10-5 win over their cross-town rival White Sox

matsui.title: Luis Rengifo, Kyle Harrison lead Brewers in 7-1 win
matsui.blurb: Luis Rengifo drives in three runs and Kyle Harrison tosses five scoreless innings to lead the Brewers to a 7-1 win over the Padres
